name: Logic Advance
description_short: Logic Advance is a direct alternative lender offering small business funding up to $1M with same-day approval and funding. They specialize in merchant cash advances, lines of credit, and equipment financing.
description_long:
Logic Advance Group is a New York-based direct alternative lender focused on providing fast working capital and business financing solutions to small and mid-sized businesses. The company positions itself as a direct funder—meaning they lend their own capital rather than acting as a broker—and emphasize transparency, speed, and flexibility in their lending process.

The company offers three primary loan products: Merchant Cash Advances (funded in 1-3 business days with flexible revenue-based qualification), Business Lines of Credit (revolving access to capital with interest paid only on amounts used), and Equipment Financing (spreading equipment costs over time with the equipment as collateral). Loan amounts range up to $1M, with factor rates starting at 1.19 for merchant cash advances and APR from 5.9% for equipment financing. They also operate a partner program for ISOs and brokers, providing commission structures and dedicated portal access.

Logic Advance differentiates itself through proprietary technology, including their "Speed Engine" (claiming 2-minute application-to-offer conversion and 4-hour average funding times) and "FundingScore™" (a real-time assessment tool analyzing 50+ data points). They claim an 85% approval rate, 98% same-day decision rate, and feature AI-enhanced underwriting that evaluates revenue trends, bank statements, and industry benchmarks rather than relying solely on credit scores. The company reports a 4.9-star Google rating, an A+ BBB rating, and has been featured in Forbes, Inc.com, and Business Magazine.

While Logic Advance presents compelling marketing claims around speed and transparency, potential borrowers should note that published factor rates and APRs are minimums, actual terms depend on individual underwriting, and the company's claims about approval speed and same-day funding—while technically possible—represent best-case scenarios rather than typical outcomes. The business lending space is competitive, and borrowers should compare offers across multiple lenders before committing.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Direct funder model eliminates broker markups and middleman fees
Fastest turnaround claims in the industry: 2-minute application-to-offer and 4-hour average funding
Proprietary FundingScore™ tool provides real-time pre-qualification before formal application
AI-enhanced underwriting analyzes 50+ data points including revenue trends and seasonality, not just credit scores
Multiple product options (merchant cash advance, line of credit, equipment financing) for different business needs
Transparent pricing with stated no hidden fees policy and clear factor rates/APR ranges
Dedicated ISO/broker partner program with white-glove portal, real-time commission tracking, and API integration
Strong third-party credentials: 4.9 Google rating, A+ BBB accreditation, Trustpilot "Excellent" rating, media features in Forbes and Inc.com
cons: Published rates are minimums; actual factor rates and APR depend on individual underwriting and creditworthiness
Same-day funding claims are best-case scenarios; average 4-hour funding time is still dependent on bank processing times
Merchant cash advances use factor rates (1.19x+) rather than traditional APR, making true cost comparison difficult versus conventional loans
Limited loan amount information—$1M stated maximum but no minimum disclosed, and typical approval amounts unclear
No information about specific credit score requirements, business age minimums, or revenue thresholds despite claims of flexible qualification
best_for: E-commerce and retail businesses with consistent daily revenue seeking merchant cash advances
Established small businesses needing quick working capital without lengthy traditional bank approval processes
ISO and broker partners seeking competitive commission structures and automated deal submission tools
Business owners with non-traditional credit profiles who can demonstrate strong bank statements and revenue trends
diagnosis: Logic Advance is best suited for established small businesses and e-commerce retailers with demonstrated revenue who need capital faster than traditional banks can provide and whose credit profiles may not qualify for conventional loans. The main caveat is that advertised speeds and rates are optimal scenarios; actual approval timing, funding velocity, and final terms will vary based on individual underwriting, and merchant cash advance factor rates (not APR) can be difficult to compare directly against traditional loan products.
services: Merchant Cash Advances with factor rates from 1.19x, funded in 1-3 business days
Business Lines of Credit up to $150K with 2.1% monthly rates and revolving access
Equipment Financing up to $500K with APR from 5.9% and 60-month terms
Real-time FundingScore™ assessment tool analyzing 50+ data points before application
Proprietary Speed Engine with auto-underwriting (2-minute application-to-offer conversion)
AI-enhanced underwriting analyzing revenue, bank statements, industry benchmarks, and seasonality
Same-day fund deposit into business accounts upon approval
Dedicated ISO/broker partner portal with real-time commission tracking and deal management
REST API integration for CRM and custom workflow automation
White-glove partner support with one-click deal submission and 24/7 portal access
Pre-qualification in minutes without lengthy paperwork
Expert advisor consultation to match businesses with optimal funding products
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
